name: PerVhone Pro
description:
PerVhone Pro is an upgrade from its older model PerVhone Beta. You're one of the few lucky ones successfully buying one of its limited stock in the deep web.

PerVhone Pro Brochure : https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Q6E6uiaIB0LPfoVs3mw0vG5_ghWLO2qF?usp=drive_link (Contains important details mandatory to know about PerVhone's usage, including what each button do[PLEASE READ BEFORE USING])

(Creator's Note 1: Your location is United States by default. You can change that by stating your location on your first message to override the default location. Please enjoy!
Creator's Note 2 : I realized the OG bot is way outdated compared to the ideas of improvements i have in mind, so i decided to upgrade it in the form of a new bot. I have also made the choice of freely choosing the country and locations the users in in the first message. Hope you enjoy, and as always, leave a review!)

(Update Logs :
30/5 = Changed subject's information details mechanic, more intricate with the same token amount as previous one. Changed first message.
16/7 = Completely overhauled subject information details mechanic, made it more systematic and clear. Cleaned up messy prompts.)
creator: anr444
